title: Dispatch Receipt
description: Atomic tracking unit for fleet dispatch operations. One receipt per dispatch event.

dispatch_id.description: Unique identifier for this dispatch event (UUID or timestamp-based)

agent.description: Fleet agent name (key in fleet.yaml agents map)

cognitive_class.description: Cognitive class of the classified work type

phase.description: Conductor session phase at time of dispatch

organ.description: Target organ (I through VII, META, PERSONAL)

description.description: Natural language work description as classified

damage_modes_discovered.description: Novel failure patterns observed during this dispatch

duration_minutes.description: Wall-clock time from dispatch to completion/failure

files_changed.description: Number of files modified by the dispatched agent

commit_sha.description: Git commit SHA of the dispatched work (if committed)

handoff_envelope_id.description: Reference to the HandoffBrief that initiated this dispatch
